reason: Finance PBIX seed was copied, Project 13 model was pushed through the Power BI Desktop TOM/XMLA session, Desktop saved the seed PBIX, native layout was patched, and final PBIX was reopened/validated. On 2026-06-23 the native layout was upgraded again so all slicers sit in a top filter bar, then the final PBIX passed package validation, pbi-tools extract, Desktop exact-file open-check, and screenshot QA.
